info.title: NGP VAN API
info.description: NGP VAN provides technology for Democratic and progressive campaigns and organizations. The VAN API enables programmatic access to manage people, events, contributions, canvass responses, codes, export jobs, bulk imports, and other campaign and organizing data.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.
